name: Backburner
description: The Backburner is a Hyperion SMG built around a fixed-element Maliwan barrel, boosting status chance and damage over time for its rarity. As with other Hyperion SMGs, accuracy improves the longer you hold the trigger, starting less steady and tightening during sustained fire.
notes: Part of the fixed-element Hyperion SMG line. It can spawn from green rarity upwards, and in Borderlands 2 it is most commonly obtained as a standard world drop.
